name: ChatGPT: New Chat And Send
description: Open ChatGPT in the current tab, normalize to a fresh chat, default to Pro with Extended effort unless overridden, send the prompt, and return the resolved chat id.

help.summary: Open a fresh ChatGPT chat, send the first prompt, and return the resolved chat id.

parameters.name: message_text
parameters.description: Prompt text to send to ChatGPT

parameters.name: model_slug
parameters.description: Optional model label to select before sending

parameters.name: model_effort
parameters.description: Optional reasoning effort label to select before sending

examples.command: rzn-browser run chatgpt new-chat-send-v1 --param message_text="Summarize the last three commits."
rzn-browser run chatgpt new-chat-send-v1 --param message_text="Summarize the last three commits." --param model_slug="Pro" --param model_effort="Extended"

help.returns: Resolved chat id, selected model info, and immediate post-send thread state.
notes: Uses the current authenticated ChatGPT tab.
Defaults to Pro with Extended effort when those controls are available.

browser_automation.description: Current-tab ChatGPT entry flow. It reuses the authenticated browser session, resets to a fresh composer, defaults to Pro with Extended effort unless overridden, sends the initial prompt, and returns thread metadata.

sequences.name: chatgpt_new_chat_send
sequences.description: Open ChatGPT home -> ensure fresh chat -> default/select model and effort -> send message -> return chat_id.

required_variables.name: message_text
required_variables.description: Prompt text to send to ChatGPT

steps.name: Open ChatGPT home in the current tab
Allow the SPA shell to settle
Wait for the ChatGPT composer or thread shell
steps.selector: #prompt-textarea, textarea[placeholder*='Message' i], textarea[placeholder*='Send a message' i], form textarea, [data-message-author-role], main article

steps.name: Ensure a fresh chat, default/select model and effort, send the first prompt, and return thread state
steps.script: const cleanArg = (value) => { const text = String(value == null ? '' : value).trim(); return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(text) ? '' : text; }; const message = cleanArg(arg0); const requestedModel = cleanArg(arg1); const desiredModel = requestedModel || 'Pro'; const requestedEffort = cleanArg(arg2); const desiredEffort = requestedEffort || (/\bpro\b/i.test(desiredModel) ? 'Extended' : ''); if (!message) { throw new Error('message_text is required'); } const sleep = (ms) => new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms)); const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const parseTime = (value) => { const ts = value ? Date.parse(value) : NaN; return Number.isFinite(ts) ? ts : 0; }; const interactiveSelector = "button, [role='button'], [role='option'], [role='menuitemradio'], [role='menuitem'], [data-testid], label"; const isVisible = (node) => { if (!node || !(node instanceof Element)) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(node); if (style.visibility === 'hidden' || style.display === 'none') return false; const rect = node.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0; }; const labelOf = (node) => normalize([node.getAttribute('aria-label') || '', node.getAttribute('title') || '', node.getAttribute('data-testid') || '', node.textContent || ''].join(' ')); const isNoiseLabel = (label) => /share|login|log in|sign up|sidebar|history|search chats|temporary chat|new chat|new conversation|cookie preferences|developer mode/.test(label); const click = async (node) => { node.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center', inline: 'center' }); node.click(); await sleep(350); }; const chatIdFromLocation = () => { const match = window.location.pathname.match(/^\/c\/([^/?#]+)/); return match ? match[1] : null; }; const temporaryChatActive = () => new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('temporary-chat') === 'true'; const collectTurns = () => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("[data-message-author-role], main article, [data-testid*='conversation-turn'], [data-testid*='conversationTurn']")); const getConversationHistoryItems = () => { for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i += 1) { const key = localStorage.key(i); if (!key || !/conversation-history/i.test(key)) continue; try { const raw = localStorage.getItem(key); if (!raw) continue; const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); const pages = parsed?.value?.pages || []; const items = pages.flatMap((page) => Array.isArray(page?.items) ? page.items : []); return items.filter((item) => item && typeof item.id === 'string'); } catch {} } return []; }; const snapshotConversationHistory = () => getConversationHistoryItems().map((item, index) => ({ id: item.id, title: item.title || null, update_time: item.update_time || null, create_time: item.create_time || null, updated_at_ms: Math.max(parseTime(item.update_time), parseTime(item.create_time)), index })).filter((item) => item.id); const makeHistoryMap = (items) => new Map(items.map((item) => [item.id, item])); const chooseHistoryConversation = (beforeMap, afterItems) => { const changed = afterItems.filter((item) => { const previous = beforeMap.get(item.id); return !previous || item.updated_at_ms > previous.updated_at_ms; }); const pool = changed.length ? changed : afterItems; if (!pool.length) return null; return [...pool].sort((left, right) => { const leftIsNew = beforeMap.has(left.id) ? 0 : 1; const rightIsNew = beforeMap.has(right.id) ? 0 : 1; if (rightIsNew !== leftIsNew) return rightIsNew - leftIsNew; if (right.updated_at_ms !== left.updated_at_ms) return right.updated_at_ms - left.updated_at_ms; return left.index - right.index; })[0] || null; }; const findComposer = () => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("#prompt-textarea, textarea[placeholder*='Message' i], textarea[placeholder*='Send a message' i], textarea[placeholder*='Ask anything' i], textarea[aria-label*='message' i], textarea[aria-label*='chatgpt' i], form textarea, div[role='textbox'][contenteditable='true'], div[role='textbox'][contenteditable='plaintext-only'], [contenteditable='true'][data-testid*='composer'], [contenteditable='plaintext-only'][data-testid*='composer'], div.ProseMirror[contenteditable='true'], div.ProseMirror[contenteditable='plaintext-only']")).find(isVisible) || null; const setComposerText = (node, text) => { node.focus(); if (node instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement || node instanceof HTMLInputElement) { const setter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(Object.getPrototypeOf(node), 'value')?.set || Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype, 'value')?.set || Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value')?.set; if (setter) setter.call(node, text); else node.value = text; node.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', { bubbles: true, inputType: 'insertText', data: text })); node.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return; } node.textContent = text; node.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', { bubbles: true, inputType: 'insertText', data: text })); }; const findSendButton = (composer) => { const form = composer ? composer.closest('form') : null; const scopes = [form, composer?.parentElement, document].filter(Boolean); for (const scope of scopes) { const candidates = Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll("button, [role='button']")).filter(isVisible).filter((node) => { const label = labelOf(node).toLowerCase(); const disabled = node.matches(':disabled') || node.getAttribute('aria-disabled') === 'true'; if (disabled) return false; return /send prompt|send|submit/.test(label); }); if (candidates.length) return candidates[0]; } return null; }; const findNewChatControl = () => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("a[data-testid='create-new-chat-button'], a[href='/'][data-testid='create-new-chat-button'], a[href='/'], a[href^='/?model='], button, [role='button']")).filter(isVisible).find((node) => { const href = node.getAttribute('href') || ''; const label = labelOf(node).toLowerCase(); return node.getAttribute('data-testid') === 'create-new-chat-button' || href === '/' || href.startsWith('/?model=') || /new chat|new conversation|start new chat/.test(label); }) || null; const findTemporaryToggle = () => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("button, [role='button']")).filter(isVisible).find((node) => /temporary chat/.test(labelOf(node).toLowerCase())) || null; const ensureFreshChat = async () => { const actions = []; const tempToggle = findTemporaryToggle(); if (temporaryChatActive() && tempToggle) { await click(tempToggle); await sleep(700); actions.push('toggled_temporary_chat_off'); } const newChatControl = findNewChatControl(); if (newChatControl) { await click(newChatControl); await sleep(1200); actions.push('clicked_new_chat'); } const composer = findComposer(); if (!composer) return { changed: actions.length > 0, reason: actions.join(',') || 'composer_missing' }; return { changed: actions.length > 0, reason: actions.join(',') || 'fresh_ready' }; }; const labelMatchesModel = (label, wanted) => { const normalizedLabel = normalize(label).toLowerCase(); const normalizedWanted = normalize(wanted).toLowerCase(); if (!normalizedLabel || !normalizedWanted) return false; if (normalizedWanted === 'pro') return /\bpro\b/.test(normalizedLabel); return normalizedLabel.includes(normalizedWanted); }; const labelMatchesEffort = (label, wanted) => { const normalizedLabel = normalize(label).toLowerCase(); const normalizedWanted = normalize(wanted).toLowerCase(); if (!normalizedLabel || !normalizedWanted) return false; if (normalizedWanted === 'extended') return /\bextended\b/.test(normalizedLabel); if (normalizedWanted === 'standard') return /\bstandard\b/.test(normalizedLabel); return normalizedLabel.includes(normalizedWanted); }; const extractEffortFromLabel = (label) => { const normalizedLabel = normalize(label).toLowerCase(); if (/\bextended\b/.test(normalizedLabel)) return 'Extended'; if (/\bstandard\b/.test(normalizedLabel)) return 'Standard'; return null; }; const distanceTo = (node, anchor) => { if (!anchor || !(anchor instanceof Element)) return 0; const a = anchor.getBoundingClientRect(); const b = node.getBoundingClientRect(); const ax = a.left + (a.width / 2); const ay = a.top + (a.height / 2); const bx = b.left + (b.width / 2); const by = b.top + (b.height / 2); return Math.hypot(ax - bx, ay - by); }; const sortByAnchor = (nodes, anchor) => [...nodes].sort((left, right) => distanceTo(left, anchor) - distanceTo(right, anchor)); const collectInteractive = (scope = document) => Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll(interactiveSelector)).filter(isVisible); const findCurrentModelChip = () => { const composer = findComposer(); const form = composer ? composer.closest('form') : null; const scopes = [form, composer?.parentElement, document].filter(Boolean); for (const scope of scopes) { const matches = sortByAnchor(collectInteractive(scope).filter((node) => { const label = labelOf(node).toLowerCase(); if (!label || isNoiseLabel(label) || /configure/.test(label)) return false; return /extended pro|standard pro|\bpro\b|instant|thinking|latest|model|gpt|o1|o3|o4|4o|4\.1|mini|reason/.test(label); }), composer); if (matches.length) return matches[0]; } return null; }; const openModelMenu = async () => { const composer = findComposer(); const form = composer ? composer.closest('form') : null; const scopes = [form, composer?.parentElement, document].filter(Boolean); for (const scope of scopes) { const matches = sortByAnchor(collectInteractive(scope).filter((node) => { const label = labelOf(node).toLowerCase(); if (isNoiseLabel(label) || /configure/.test(label)) return false; if (/extended pro|standard pro|\bpro\b|instant|thinking|latest|model|gpt|o1|o3|o4|4o|4\.1|mini|reason/.test(label)) return true; return node.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') === 'menu'; }), composer); if (matches.length) { await click(matches[0]); await sleep(500); return matches[0]; } } throw new Error('requested model but no model picker was found'); }; const findModelOption = () => sortByAnchor(collectInteractive(document).filter((node) => { const label = labelOf(node).toLowerCase(); if (!label || isNoiseLabel(label) || /configure/.test(label)) return false; return labelMatchesModel(label, desiredModel); }), findComposer())[0] || null; const findEffortOption = () => sortByAnchor(collectInteractive(document).filter((node) => { const label = labelOf(node).toLowerCase(); if (!label || isNoiseLabel(label)) return false; if (/pro thinking effort/.test(label)) return false; return labelMatchesEffort(label, desiredEffort); }), findComposer())[0] || null; const trySelectModel = async () => { let currentChip = findCurrentModelChip(); let selectedModel = currentChip ? labelOf(currentChip) : null; let selectedEffort = extractEffortFromLabel(selectedModel); let modelChanged = false; let effortChanged = false; let modelStrategy = requestedModel ? 'requested_explicitly' : 'defaulted_to_pro'; let effortStrategy = desiredEffort ? (requestedEffort ? 'requested_explicitly' : 'defaulted_for_pro') : 'skipped'; if (!labelMatchesModel(selectedModel, desiredModel)) { let option = findModelOption(); if (!option) { await openModelMenu(); option = findModelOption(); } if (!option) throw new Error(`requested model '${desiredModel}' but no matching option was found`); const optionLabel = labelOf(option); await click(option); await sleep(700); modelChanged = true; currentChip = findCurrentModelChip(); selectedModel = currentChip ? labelOf(currentChip) : optionLabel; } if (desiredEffort && /\bpro\b/i.test(desiredModel)) { currentChip = findCurrentModelChip(); selectedModel = currentChip ? labelOf(currentChip) : selectedModel; selectedEffort = extractEffortFromLabel(selectedModel); if (!labelMatchesEffort(selectedModel, desiredEffort)) { let option = findEffortOption(); if (!option) { const trigger = currentChip || await openModelMenu(); if (trigger) { await click(trigger); await sleep(500); } option = findEffortOption(); } if (!option) throw new Error(`requested model effort '${desiredEffort}' but no matching option was found`); const optionLabel = labelOf(option); await click(option); await sleep(700); effortChanged = true; currentChip = findCurrentModelChip(); selectedModel = currentChip ? labelOf(currentChip) : (selectedModel || optionLabel); selectedEffort = extractEffortFromLabel(selectedModel) || optionLabel; } } currentChip = findCurrentModelChip(); selectedModel = currentChip ? labelOf(currentChip) : selectedModel; selectedEffort = extractEffortFromLabel(selectedModel) || selectedEffort; return { requested_model: desiredModel, requested_effort: desiredEffort || null, selected_model: selectedModel, selected_effort: selectedEffort, changed: modelChanged || effortChanged, model_changed: modelChanged, effort_changed: effortChanged, strategy: { model: modelStrategy, effort: effortStrategy } }; }; const freshChat = await ensureFreshChat(); const modelSelection = await trySelectModel(); const historyBeforeItems = snapshotConversationHistory(); const historyBeforeMap = makeHistoryMap(historyBeforeItems); const turnsBefore = collectTurns().length; let composer = findComposer(); if (!composer) throw new Error('ChatGPT composer not found after chat initialization'); setComposerText(composer, message); await sleep(250); composer = findComposer() || composer; const sendButton = findSendButton(composer); if (!sendButton) throw new Error('ChatGPT send button not found'); await click(sendButton); let chatId = chatIdFromLocation(); let historyConversation = null; let historySignal = 'none'; let turnCount = collectTurns().length; const deadline = Date.now() + 45000; while (Date.now() < deadline) { chatId = chatIdFromLocation(); const historyAfterItems = snapshotConversationHistory(); const candidate = chooseHistoryConversation(historyBeforeMap, historyAfterItems); const previous = candidate ? historyBeforeMap.get(candidate.id) : null; const candidateIsFresh = !!candidate && (!previous || candidate.updated_at_ms > previous.updated_at_ms); if (candidate) { historyConversation = candidate; historySignal = candidateIsFresh ? (previous ? 'updated_history_item' : 'new_history_item') : 'stale_history_fallback'; } turnCount = collectTurns().length; if (chatId || candidateIsFresh) break; await sleep(turnCount > turnsBefore ? 1200 : 750); } return { url: window.location.href, title: document.title, chat_id: chatIdFromLocation() || (historySignal !== 'stale_history_fallback' && historyConversation ? historyConversation.id : null), temporary_chat_active: temporaryChatActive(), fresh_chat: freshChat, model_selection: modelSelection, message_sent: message, turn_count: turnCount, history_signal: historySignal, history_before_count: historyBeforeItems.length, history_conversation: historyConversation ? { id: historyConversation.id, title: historyConversation.title || null, update_time: historyConversation.update_time || null, create_time: historyConversation.create_time || null } : null };
